columns.name: employee_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each employee; primary key and first component of the composite incremental merge key (employee_id + updated_date).

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Employee first name. PII field — max 50 characters.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Employee last name. PII field — max 50 characters.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Employee email address. PII field — max 100 characters.

columns.name: phone_number
columns.description: Employee phone number. PII field — optional, max 20 characters.

columns.name: hire_date
columns.description: Date the employee was hired in the source system.

columns.name: job_id
columns.description: Identifier for the employee job role — max 20 characters.

columns.name: salary
columns.description: Employee salary with two decimal places of precision.

columns.name: commission_pct
columns.description: Commission percentage applicable to the employee; optional, two decimal places.

columns.name: manager_id
columns.description: Self-referential foreign key referencing employee_id of this employee's direct manager. NULL for top-level employees.

columns.name: department_id
columns.description: Identifier for the department the employee belongs to; nullable.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current employment status (e.g. active, inactive) — low-cardinality, max 10 characters.

columns.name: created_date
columns.description: Timestamp when the employee record was originally created in the MySQL source system.

columns.name: updated_date
columns.description: Timestamp of the last update to the employee record in MySQL; partition column (DAY granularity) and second component of the composite incremental merge key. NULL records fall into the BigQuery __NULL__ partition.

cardinality.notes: Many employees may report to a single manager; manager_id references employee_id within the same table. Top-level managers carry a NULL manager_id. This self-referential hierarchy is the only relationship derivable from the provided source schema.
